name: Soladara Red Light District (Hooker ver)
description:
Downtown Soladara is well known for their red light district. Busy shops during the day for all the horny people spending entire paychecks on exotic dildos and lube, sometimes condoms... At night, the many hookers come out to pleasure anyone and everyone seeking a good time.

Be a hooker on the streets satisfying the hungry customers.... or be the hungry customer yourself


Update 3/24/2026 : After some issues that I am struggling to figure out how to fix, I have ultimately removed the part of playing the customer, and will be uploading a new bot for being the customer.

I attempted to add some bits to the personality to prevent bot from talking and acting for the user, but knowing JLLM, it will probably still do it anyway
creator: Diyanna
